participants.name: Sam Hecht
participants.notes: Top center prospect; 2026 NFL Combine invitee. Combine results: 5.10 forty, 28.0 vertical, 101 broad, 7.75 cone, 4.71 shuttle. At K-State pro day he participated in positional drills only, standing on Combine numbers. Bears sent large contingent of scouts/coaches to watch him. Projected 3rd-4th round pick.

participants.name: VJ Payne
participants.notes: 2026 NFL Combine invitee. Combine results: 4.40 forty, 35.0 vertical, 127 broad (10-foot-7). Likely stood on Combine numbers and did positional drills at pro day. Met with Chiefs at Combine. 9.86 RAS score.

additional_notes: Kansas State held its 2026 Pro Day on Tuesday, March 10, 2026, at the school's indoor practice facility in Manhattan, Kansas. The event occurred just two days ago and comprehensive testing results for all participants have not yet been published. Available coverage focuses almost exclusively on Sam Hecht (IOL/C) and VJ Payne (S), the school's two 2026 NFL Combine invitees. The K-State athletics website published a feature article about Hecht's pro day experience but did not include a results sheet. Both Hecht and Payne appear to have stood on their Combine numbers and participated in positional drills. The Chicago Bears reportedly had a large contingent of scouts and coaches in attendance focused on Hecht, per Brad Biggs of the Chicago Tribune. Additional participants almost certainly worked out (K-State pro days in recent years have featured 10-15+ participants), but no source has published a participant list or individual testing numbers for the non-Combine invitees. The Big 12 is also hosting a joint pro day at The Star in Frisco, Texas, which may provide additional testing opportunities for K-State prospects. This record should be updated when full results become available.
